topPlaces.name: Kaleshwaram
topPlaces.description: Kaleshwaram is a village in Mahadevpur Mandal in Jayashankar Bhupalpally district in the Indian state of Telangana. This name refers more broadly to the state of Telangana & Kaleshwaram Temple.

topPlaces.name: Pranahita River
topPlaces.description: The Pranahita River is the largest tributary of Godavari River covering about 34% of its drainage basin conveying the combined waters of the Penganga River, the Wardha River, and the Wainganga River. By virtue of its extensive network of tributaries, the river drains a large part of Vidarbha region in Maharashtra, as well as the southern slopes of the Satpura Range in southeast Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Ramanujapuram, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Ramanujapuram is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sironcha
topPlaces.description: Sironcha is a town and municipal council in Gadchiroli district of Maharashtra state in India. It connected with NH-63.

topPlaces.name: Saraswati Barrage
topPlaces.description: The Saraswati Barrage, also known as the Annaram Barrage is an irrigation project on Godavari River located at Annaram Village, Mahadevpur Mandal, Jayashankar Bhupalpally district in Telangana State, India. This is the second point and one of the barrages proposed in Kaleshwaram Lift Irrigation Project which envisages construction of three barrages between Yellampalli and Medigadda.

items.note: Kaleshwaram is a village in Mahadevpur Mandal in Jayashankar Bhupalpally district in the Indian state of Telangana. This name refers more broadly to the state of Telangana & Kaleshwaram Temple.

The Pranahita River is the largest tributary of Godavari River covering about 34% of its drainage basin conveying the combined waters of the Penganga River, the Wardha River, and the Wainganga River. By virtue of its extensive network of tributaries, the river drains a large part of Vidarbha region in Maharashtra, as well as the southern slopes of the Satpura Range in southeast Madhya Pradesh.
Ramanujapuram is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Sironcha is a town and municipal council in Gadchiroli district of Maharashtra state in India. It connected with NH-63.

The Saraswati Barrage, also known as the Annaram Barrage is an irrigation project on Godavari River located at Annaram Village, Mahadevpur Mandal, Jayashankar Bhupalpally district in Telangana State, India. This is the second point and one of the barrages proposed in Kaleshwaram Lift Irrigation Project which envisages construction of three barrages between Yellampalli and Medigadda.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (234 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (213 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaleshwara Mukteswara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaleshwaram, Pranahita River, Ramanujapuram, Thanjavur, Sironcha, Saraswati Barrage.
